title: Climatology
description: Long-term average of a climate variable, typically over 20–30 years, computed for specified time ranges such as monthly or daily means.

definitions.definition: Long-term average of a climate variable, typically over 20–30 years, computed for specified time ranges such as monthly or daily means.
